google.text: GOALPrime Organization Nigeria (GPON) Section 8: Official not to benefit 39. By signing this VRF, potential vendors confirm that they have read, understood and will comply with the GPON policy on the "zero tolerance" that strictly prohibits the acceptance of any type of gift and/or hospitality by GPON staff members participating in the procurement process. Please confirm. Any breach of this clause may lead to the termination of all contracts your Company may have with GPON and removal from the approved vendor database. Yes No Section 9: Others 40. Is your company already registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC)? If so, please provide registration number. 41. Certification: I, the undersigned, hereby accept the GPON General Conditions, a copy of which has been provided to me, and warrant that the information provided in this form is correct and, in the event of changes, details will be provided as soon as possible: 42. Self-Declaration: I, the undersigned, declare that: (a) Our company is not involved in any fraudulent or corrupt activities and has not been in the past and is not currently under any investigation for any such activities which would render our company unsuitable for business dealing with GPON. (b) Our company is not on, or associated with a company or individual, groups, undertakings and entities that are on the consolidated list established and maintained by the committee established by GOALPrime. (c) Our company is not currently removed, invalidated or suspended by any other UN Headquarters, or Field Offices or any other UN Agencies (including the World Bank) Name: Stamp and Signature: Functional Title: Date: Plot 140 Ambassador Yusufari street off NUJ house new GRA Bama road Maiduguri Borno State. Phone number: +2349094901227 Email: procurement.elect@goalprime.org, info@goalprime.org 3
